offline_access.description: Request long-lived refresh tokens so your app can act on behalf of users even when they’re not actively signed in. Typical Twitter use case: keeping a background service synced without forcing users to reauthorize every session.

profile.description: Pull account profile metadata such as display name, bio, location, and URL so downstream apps can prefill or personalize user experiences.

tweet_read.description: Allow the application to read a user’s public and protected Tweets—required for timelines, analytics, or moderation workflows.

users_read.description: Read non-Tweet user information (e.g., followers/following, account settings) to power relationship graphs or audience insights.
